features.name: explicit package export statement
features.description: Code should include an explicit export statement in a package that re-exports an imported identifier from another package

features.name: wildcard package export
features.description: Code should include a wildcard export statement to export all imported identifiers from a package

features.name: cross_package_import_chain
features.description: Code should include a module that imports from a package which itself imports and re-exports from another package

features.name: multi_package_wildcard_import_no_conflict
features.description: Code should include wildcard imports from multiple packages where the same identifier exists in both but refers to the same underlying object, avoiding conflict
